note: Jetson Orin Nano (Tegra). Latency = mean `total` ms per vla-server call. Memory = sys Δ (MemTotal-MemAvailable rise) - the only figure that captures the unified-memory iGPU carveout. NB: the report measured the light models (smolvla/bitvla/evo1) co-located, so their sys-Δ baseline includes a co-resident client/sim and is an upper bound; CI runs server-only on orin, so a pass is expected with margin.
